profile.name: K Shivasankari
profile.headline: Bitcoin & Blockchain Advisory
profile.location: 1/131,Telephone colony, Uierialpoonga road, vinayagampatti(PO), salem-636008,Tamil nadu.
bio: I partner with founders, HR leaders, and boards to design operating models, talent strategies, and people analytics that connect people decisions directly to product, risk, and regulatory priorities.
My work focuses on building HR capabilities that are lean, transparent, and data-informed—without overwhelming managers or employees with process for its own sake.

about.title: Independent HR and people advisory for scaling technology and Web3 organizations.
